final_prompt.prompt:
Edit the logo image (reference #1) to look like it is written with soy sauce, referencing the soy sauce writing style from the second reference image (#2).

风格/媒介: soy sauce on surface, top-view angle, photorealistic liquid rendering
构图: top-down / overhead view, logo text rendered as if drawn/written with soy sauce
主体: the logo from reference #1, redrawn in soy sauce
场景/背景: flat surface viewed from directly above
光线/氛围: even overhead lighting consistent with top-view food photography
色彩方案: dark brown soy sauce tones
材质/纹理: liquid soy sauce, wet glossy surface, natural pooling and stroke edges matching reference #2
文字(原样):
约束:
  preserve the original logo letterforms and layout from reference #1
  soy sauce writing style must match reference #2
避免: upright or angled perspective; dry or painted look
